title: Crispy Ukrainian Cheese Flatbread
description: A fatty, silky flatbread with spring onions, double-rise dough, and a generous layer of cheese, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: In a bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Add warm water and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth.
Add melted butter to the dough and knead for another 2 minutes.
Cover the dough, let it rise for 60 minutes until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough, roll it into a 1cm thick rectangle.
Sprinkle crumbled cheese and chopped spring onions evenly over the dough surface.
Fold the dough into thirds, then roll again to create layers of filling.
Transfer the rolled dough to a parchment-lined baking tray and brush the top with olive oil.
Let the dough rise again for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 220C and bake the flatbread for 15 minutes until golden and crispy.
Remove from the oven, let cool for 5 minutes, then slice and serve.
